hero.headline:
Stake AZR.
Earn Every Day.
hero.sub: Azora's AI-driven smart contracts handle every swap, monitor every stake, and distribute every reward automatically, around the clock. Powered by intelligent automation, the protocol works tirelessly so you don't have to. Earn 0.7% daily while AI manages the rest.

howItWorks.title: How Azora Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Connect your BSC wallet. Azora registers your on-chain identity and assigns a unique .azr username to your account in seconds.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Swap USDT to AZR at a 1:1 reserve rate, then stake your tokens. The smart contract locks your position and begins accruing rewards immediately.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Azora accrues 0.7% daily rewards per second on your staked principal. Claim rewards at any time during the lock period and withdraw after it expires.

calculator.title: Yield Calculator
calculator.sub: See exactly what you will earn at 0.7% daily — no guesswork.
calculator.label: Stake amount (AZR)

features.title: Azora Protocol
features.sub: Six ways Azora's smart contracts work for you, 24/7.
features.f1Desc: Every interaction is governed by auditable smart contracts on BNB Smart Chain — transparent, immutable, and running without any central intermediary.
features.f2Desc: Azora traces 3-level referral chains on-chain and distributes 5% / 2% / 1% commissions the moment a stake is confirmed.
features.f3Desc: Withdrawal requests enter a secure queue reviewed by Azora administrators before processing, adding an extra layer of protection against unauthorised payouts.
features.f4Desc: Connect with MetaMask, Trust Wallet, WalletConnect, Coinbase Wallet, or any BSC-compatible wallet — seamlessly.
features.f5Desc: AZR has a fixed maximum supply of 100 billion tokens, enforced on-chain. No hidden minting. Fully transparent and verifiable on BscScan.
features.f6Desc: Rewards are calculated per second by the smart contract. Claim at any moment during your lock period — your balance updates in real time.

referral.title: 3-Level Referral Network
referral.sub: Azora traces your referral chain on-chain automatically. Every time someone in your network stakes, your commission is calculated and paid instantly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is AZR and how does it work?
faq.a1: AZR is the native token of the Azora decentralized staking protocol on BNB Smart Chain. Fixed at 100 billion tokens, AZR is used by the protocol to pay staking rewards and referral commissions. It is not a stablecoin — its value fluctuates with market conditions.
faq.q2: How are my 0.7% daily rewards calculated?
faq.a2: Rewards accrue per second via the smart contract: pendingRewards = staked × 0.007 × (elapsedSeconds / 86400). Rewards are non-compounding, calculated on your original staked principal and settled the moment you claim.
faq.q3: What happens during my 150-day lock period?
faq.a3: The smart contract monitors your stake and accrues rewards every second during the lock. You can claim rewards at any time. Unstaking the principal is only available after 150 days — enforced automatically by the contract.
faq.a4: When someone stakes using your referral link, Azora traces the 3-level chain on-chain and distributes commissions instantly: 5% to you (L1), 2% to your referrer (L2), 1% to the next level (L3). Paid from the reward pool in real time.
faq.q5: How does the withdrawal process work?
faq.a5: Withdrawal requests enter a secure admin review queue. A fee applies (shown before you submit). Once approved, funds are released to your wallet. This review step ensures only legitimate requests are processed.
faq.q6: How do I get AZR to stake?
faq.a6: Use the Swap page inside the Azora app to convert USDT to AZR at a 1:1 reserve rate. The contract processes the swap and you can stake immediately. More exchange listings will follow after public listing.

cta.title: Start earning with Azora.
cta.sub: Join thousands of stakers already earning 0.7% daily — automatically, every single day.

footer.disclaimer: AZR Token is the native BEP-20 utility and staking token of the Azora protocol.
